title: ウイニングチケット登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket—a deeply emotional
Umamusume—dreams of entering the Japanese
Derby and becoming a racer who inspires others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She trains with Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide,
and together they cultivate a friendly rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's journey to enter the Japanese
Derby begins!
